summary: TuiEvent defined 3 times (copy-pasted) across mcp/index.ts, tui.ts handler, and tui.ts group
details: TuiEvent with toast.show, command.execute, prompt.append, session.select is defined identically in 3 different files. This copy-pasta pattern means type changes must be synchronized across all 3 sites or they drift apart.

summary: Desktop IPC channels use 'opencode:' kebab-case naming convention, separate from bus event dot-notation
details: 67 ElectronAPI methods use opencode: prefix (e.g., opencode:store-get, opencode:github-oauth-start) while the bus event system uses domain.verb dot-notation. These two naming systems are incompatible and could be unified if IPC events were bridged into the bus system. Also: event:explain channel is defined in ipc-channels.ts:70 but has NO handler registered anywhere — dead channel.
